title: Eternal Star
description: Eternal Star is a aesthetically pleasing modpack designed to be used for a small streamer server
body:
Eternal Star is a aesthetically pleasing modpack designed to be used for a small streamer server

It adds mods such as Origins, MCA Reborn, and Dynamic Trees to give a pleasing enviroment and some basic lore

This modpack is adds a wide variety of diferent nature aspects as well as quality of life mods to give the player a sense of freedom 

The modpack was really designed to build and have fun with others players so it might seem kinda lonely by yourself

P.S. 
if you make a server with it or want to join a server you need to disable valkyrian skies because of how it is setup it wont work
